task: Print every element in the list items
clarification_query: Should the loop index go up to and including the last element index, or stop one before it?
clarification_options: go up to len(items) inclusive — range(len(items) + 1)
start at 1 instead of 0 — range(1, len(items))
explanation: range(len(items) + 1) generates indices 0 through len(items), causing an IndexError on the last iteration. The correct upper bound is range(len(items)), which stops at the last valid index.
